Products.heading: Our Products
Products.subheading: Ready-to-launch solutions designed to help your business grow

products.name: Devnex
products.description: Devnex is a website builder tool that lets you build websites quickly and easily.

launch.name: Launch
description: Perfect for startups, freelancers, and local businesses that need a strong online presence quickly.
This plan is ideal when you want a clean, professional website to present your services and start getting leads.

growth.name: Growth
description: Designed for small to mid-size companies that are already operating and want to generate more traffic and conversions.
A great fit for businesses that need deeper content, stronger SEO, and better marketing performance.

scale.name: Scale
description: Built for growing companies with higher traffic and more complex business needs.
Best for teams that need advanced features, integrations, analytics, and multilingual support to scale operations and reach wider markets.

custom.name: Custom
description: Best for established companies with unique workflows that require a tailored solution.
Choose this plan when you need a custom web application or mobile app built around your exact processes, systems, and long-term goals.

features.customizable: The website can be tailored to your brand and needs (colors, layout, sections, features, and content style).
features.editable: You can easily update text, images, and key content later without rebuilding the whole site.
features.responsive: The website is fully responsive and works smoothly on all devices.
features.seoFriendly: The website is SEO-friendly and easier for search engines to index.
features.performanceOptimized: The site is built to load fast and run smoothly (optimized images/code, good Core Web Vitals, better user experience, and SEO).
features.security: The website is secure and protected against common attacks.
features.support: You receive ongoing support after launch for questions and improvements.
features.updates: The website is updated regularly to keep it secure and reliable.
features.maintenance: Ongoing maintenance keeps your site healthy with bug fixes, monitoring, backups, and minor improvements.
features.emailSupport: Email support to help you with any questions or issues.
features.sendSms: Send SMS messages to customers for updates, reminders, or promotions.
features.payOnline: Accept online payments for your services or products.
features.analyticsAndReporting: Analytics and reporting to track your website performance and growth.
features.bookingSystemAndReporting: Booking system and reporting to manage appointments and availability.
features.multipleLanguageSupport: Multiple language support to help you reach a wider audience.
features.webApplication: Custom web application development tailored to your business workflows and operational needs.
features.mobileApplication: Custom mobile application development for iOS and Android, aligned with your business goals.
